verdict: A solid budget moisturizer with soothing botanical extracts and glycerin for hydration. The calming ingredients are well-chosen for sensitive skin, though the formula lacks ceramides or peptides that would elevate it beyond basic hydration.

_research.name: Aveeno Ultra-Calming Hydrating Gel Cream
pros: Excellent safety profile for reactive skin
_research.con: Limited occlusive ingredients mean it may need a richer cream for very dry skin types.
